buildCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.12.0 --activate && corepack pnpm --filter @ctf/web run check:vercel-staging && corepack pnpm --filter @ctf/web build
installCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.12.0 --activate && corepack pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile --prod=false --filter @ctf/web...
